hotel.name: Jironi Homestay
hotel.address: Hatigaon, Guwahati, Assam 781038 (Next to Bharat Petrol Pump & Lenskart Showroom)
amenities: Free Car Parking (on-street, in front of compound)
hotel.cancellation_policy: As per Airbnb policy for Airbnb bookings. Direct bookings — contact via Instagram for terms.
hotel.pet_policy: Not specified. Contact host via Instagram to confirm.
hotel.smoking_policy: Not specified. Contact host via Instagram to confirm.
hotel.extra_bed_charge: Not applicable — units are priced per room/unit.
hotel.breakfast_charge: Not offered. Self-catering kitchen available in all independent units.
hotel.minimum_age: Both guests must be 18+ for couple bookings.
hotel.long_stay_discount: 8–15% off for stays of 7 nights or more.
hotel.direct_booking_discount: Up to 20% off vs Airbnb when booked directly via website (no service fees or extra taxes).
hotel.location_notes: Located in Hatigaon, adjacent to Dispur (capital of Assam). ~32 km / ~1 hour from Lokpriya Gopinath Bordoloi International Airport. ~7.8 km / ~30 minutes from Guwahati Railway Station. ~45–60 minutes from Maa Kamakhya Temple.
hotel.pre_arrival_note: Exact location shared only after booking is confirmed. Property is inside a private residential complex — prior viewing not allowed.

rooms.name: Picturesque Boho Chic 1BHK Unit
rooms.description: Cute Boho Chic 1BHK unit filled with sunlight. Entire space exclusively for guests — separate bedroom, living area, kitchen, and dining area. Self Check-In. Couple friendly (both 18+). Centrally located near Dispur, capital of Assam.

rooms.name: Bright / Bohemian Studio Unit
rooms.description: Bohemian & Minimalist vibe Studio Unit — open-plan living, sleeping, and dining space with kitchenette and attached bathroom. Entire studio exclusively for guests. Self Check-In. Couple friendly (both 18+).

rooms.description: Cosy & Minimalist studio unit with all required amenities. Entire studio exclusively for guests. Self Check-In. Couple friendly (both 18+). Centrally located near Dispur, capital of Assam.

faqs.question: What are your check-in and check-out times?
faqs.answer: Check-in and check-out times vary by unit. Independent units check-in from 1:00 PM–3:00 PM and check-out from 10:00 AM–12:00 PM. Jironi Rooms follow the same range. Early check-in and late check-out can be requested. If moving between rooms during an extended stay, a waiting area is available during transitions.

faqs.question: Is breakfast included?
faqs.answer: No, breakfast is not included. Independent units come with a fully equipped kitchen so guests can cook their own meals. Jironi Rooms have access to a common dining space and mini fridge.

faqs.question: Do you have parking?
faqs.answer: Yes! Free two-wheeler parking is available inside the property. Free car parking is on-street in the lane right in front of our compound — not inside, but in a safe and secure spot with CCTV coverage.

faqs.question: How far are you from the airport and railway station?
faqs.answer: We are approximately 32 km / ~1 hour from Lokpriya Gopinath Bordoloi International Airport, and approximately 7.8 km / ~30 minutes from Guwahati Railway Station.

faqs.question: What is your cancellation policy?
faqs.answer: Cancellation is handled as per Airbnb's standard policy for Airbnb bookings. For direct bookings, please contact us via Instagram for specific terms.

faqs.question: Are you couple friendly?
faqs.answer: Yes, we are couple friendly! There is no issue as long as house rules are maintained and neither guest is a minor (both must be 18+).

faqs.question: How do I make a reservation?
faqs.answer: You can book via Airbnb at airbnb.co.in/p/jironihomestays, directly through our website at jironihomestay.crd.co (save up to 20% vs Airbnb — no service fees or extra taxes), or by contacting us on Instagram at instagram.com/jironi_homestay.

faqs.question: Do you require government IDs?
faqs.answer: Yes. Since we are a licensed homestay, we require the government IDs of all guests before check-in.

faqs.question: Is prior viewing of units allowed?
faqs.answer: No. We are located inside a private residential complex. To maintain the privacy of our guests, we only share our exact location once a booking is confirmed.

faqs.question: What is the difference between a Studio Unit and a 1 BHK?
faqs.answer: A studio unit is a single open space combining living, sleeping, and dining areas with a small kitchenette and attached bathroom. A 1 BHK has a separate bedroom, living area, kitchen, and dining area — providing larger and more distinct spaces.

faqs.question: What is the difference between Independent Units and Jironi Rooms?
faqs.answer: Independent Units (5 total) give guests the entire space to themselves — fully private. Jironi Rooms (6 total) are private bedrooms (~300 sq ft each) within a shared 6 BHK, each with an attached bathroom. Rooms are separate and private from each other, with a common hall, dining space, and game area.

faqs.question: Is there a discount for long stays?
faqs.answer: Yes! Book for 7 nights or longer and get a discount of 8 to 15%. Booking directly via our website saves an additional 15–20% vs Airbnb as there are no platform service fees or extra taxes.

faqs.question: How far is Maa Kamakhya Temple?
faqs.answer: From our property in Hatigaon, it takes approximately 45 minutes to an hour to reach Maa Kamakhya Temple, which is located on the outskirts of the city.
